turns.user_message: I was quiet yesterday when I should have spoken up. I keep replaying that moment in my head.
I can't shake the feeling I'm always missing my chance to be better. It's starting to feel like a pattern I can't break.
I'm wondering if I need to actually talk to someone about this constant guilt. It's getting harder to just carry it around by myself.

generation_metadata.diversity_anchor: The speaker opens by referencing a specific recent moment.
